final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal wide banner with generous horizontal spread and sufficient negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include a city skyline at dusk with neon lights gradually illuminating, hurrying pedestrians, and distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk cityscape — neon signs coming alive, crowd in motion, golden-hour reflections on glass towers
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-contrast golden-hour-to-neon transition atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-cool dusk direction with vivid neon accents against fading daylight — exact ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture photographic surface treatment — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary, bold/modern typeface, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right or bottom area)
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio strictly; layout must leave adequate clear zones for text overlay; overall feel must read as a real 微博 viral post editorial image
Avoid:
